apply_notes: Production WordPress, no staging. Each change = a targeted edit inside the source page's post_content (repoint href, remove dead <a>, or insert a new contextual <a>). Apply in small batches (<=5 pages), backup + export each source page first, verify rendered output after each batch. The WP pack applies full post_content replacements, so the apply step must fetch each source page's current body, make the single edit, and write it back. Restaurant orphan /8-key-considerations-for-building-a-restaurant/ is HELD pending Workstream D. Homepage block is PREPARE-ONLY (do_not_touch override required).

homepage_prepare_only.rationale: F-6 PREPARE-ONLY recommendation (homepage is do_not_touch — requires explicit operator override before any apply; this artifact applies nothing). The homepage is the highest-authority node on the site (inbound 11, clicks 141) yet routes internal equity to only one priority money page (/design-build-construction-houston-2/, the sole entry in homepageOutbound). That strands the six cost-guide money pages — several of which are the site's top organic earners (warehouse 42 clicks, Dallas 23, car wash 22, Houston 21, medical 16, hotel 13) but sit on thin inbound counts (hotel 2, car wash 2, medical 6). A single 'Guides & Services' navigational block on the homepage would pass first-hop equity from the strongest source page directly into all six money guides plus the design-build service page, tightening the money-page cluster and giving crawlers a canonical hub path to the highest-intent commercial pages. All seven targets are verified live 200s in allLivePages; none is a self-link (source is '/'); none links into the held /8-key-considerations-for-building-a-restaurant/ page. Anchors are descriptive and specific (no exact-match stuffing, no generic 'click here'). URL note: the live warehouse guide is /cost-per-square-foot-build-warehouse-texas/ (the CLAUDE.md keyword-map slug /warehouse-construction-cost-per-square-foot-a-comprehensive-guide/ is not in allLivePages), and the live design-build page is /design-build-construction-houston-2/ (already homepage-linked; retained in the block to keep one consolidated hub). Because the homepage is protected, do NOT apply — escalate for operator sign-off, confirm a restorable production backup, apply as one small batch, and verify rendered output before proceeding.
